query:
-- First check if user exists
SELECT id, email, role FROM users WHERE email = 'planetsun1@me.com';

-- If exists, update; if not, insert (we'll use INSERT with ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE)
INSERT INTO users (email, password, role, name, created_at)
VALUES (
  'planetsun1@me.com',
  '$2a$10$YvJZqHxKxqXqKxqXqKxqXeOZqHxKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqK',
  'SUPER_ADMIN',
  'Admin Planet Sun',
  NOW()
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  password = '$2a$10$YvJZqHxKxqXqKxqXqKxqXeOZqHxKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqK',
  role = 'SUPER_ADMIN';
